utterances.speaker: Mrs. Bing
utterances.text: Car waiting downstairs , I just wanted to drop off these copies of my book for your friends . Anything you want from Lisbon ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No , just knowing you are gonna be there is enough .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Bing
utterances.text: Alright , well , be good , I love you .

emotion_cause.span: 2_just knowing you are gonna be there is enough .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You kissed my best Ross ! ... Or something to that effect .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Bing
utterances.text: O ... kay . Look , it , it was stupid .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Bing
utterances.text: And I do not even know how it happened .

emotion_cause.span: 8_I do not even know how it happened .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Bing
utterances.text: I am sorry , honey , I promise it will never happen again .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Ah , the forbidden love of a man and his door .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Shh . He did it . He told her off , and not just about the kiss , about everything .

emotion_cause.span: 13_He did it . He told her off , and not just about the kiss , about everything .
13_He did it . He told her off , and not just about the kiss , about everything .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No , no . He said " When are you gonna grow up and start being a mom ? "
